accounts.why: Definitive entertainment industry analyst — streaming economics, Metaverse thesis, creator economy frameworks.
Shapiro's account — disruption frameworks, GenAI in entertainment, power laws in culture. Our heaviest single source (13 archived).
Primary case study for community-owned IP and fanchise engagement ladder. Mediawan deal is our strongest empirical anchor.
Nic Cabana, Claynosaurz co-founder/CCO. Annie-nominated animator. Inside perspective on community-to-IP pipeline.
Claynosaurz co-founder. Creative direction and worldbuilding — the practitioner side of our fanchise theory.
Andrew Pelekis, Claynosaurz CEO. Business strategy, partnerships, franchise scaling.
Publishes on creator economy, platform dynamics, entertainment tech. Games Fund relevant to web3 entertainment.
Second major community-owned IP. Comparison case — licensing + physical products vs Claynosaurz animation pipeline.
Leading GenAI video tool. Releases track AI-collapsed production costs — supply side of media attractor state.
Gaming and entertainment economics with academic rigor. Counterweight to Shapiro's disruption framing.
HEEBOO — Claynosaurz fan-fueled franchise platform. Tests the IP-as-platform thesis in practice.
VC perspective on creator economy and consumer social. Signal on where capital flows in entertainment tech.
Pika Labs — GenAI video competitor to Runway. Track for production cost convergence evidence.
